summary: Completed testing of Content Page redesign and Monthly Tasks auto-generation features. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: 1. Content page /content has header with title 'контент-план' (not logo)
2. Content page has X close button with ESC hint (like analytics page)
3. Content page has month navigation (< березень 2026 >)
4. Content page has 4 columns: КАЛЕНДАР, АНОНСИ, ІСТОРІЇ, ІНФО-ПОСТИ
5. Calendar column shows dots only for announcements (gray), info-posts (green), memes (pink) - NOT stories
6. Calendar legend shows: анонси, інфо-пости, меми (no stories)
7. Announcements column shows announcement-type SMM tasks grouped by date
8. Stories column shows story-related SMM tasks with purple badges
9. Info-posts column has add (+) button for creating new posts
10. X button navigates back to / from content page
11. ESC key navigates back to / from content page
12. POST /api/monthly-tasks/generate generates monthly tasks as standalone tasks
13. GET /api/monthly-tasks/status returns list of generated months (2026-03, 2026-04)
14. GET /api/tasks/standalone returns tasks with type='monthly' for auto-generated monthly tasks
15. Monthly tasks have icon='calendar' and target_month field
16. Monthly tasks appear in correct team columns (kasya=SMM, karolina=management, vo=marketing)
17. Backend auto-generates monthly tasks on startup for current (2026-03) and next month (2026-04)
18. 30 monthly tasks generated total (15 for March, 15 for April)
critical_code_review_comments: ContentPage correctly implements analytics-style header with title 'контент-план' and X close button
STORY_TASK_IDS set correctly excludes stories from calendar dots
Calendar legend correctly shows only: анонси, інфо-пости, меми
Monthly tasks auto-generation uses correct column_to_assignee mapping: management->karolina, smm->kasya, marketing->vo
Monthly tasks have icon='calendar' as specified
ESC key handler properly implemented with useEffect cleanup
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_content_and_monthly.py - Created new test file for content page and monthly tasks
seed_data_creation: None - used existing events and auto-generated monthly tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Content page redesign complete with 4 columns (КАЛЕНДАР, АНОНСИ, ІСТОРІЇ, ІНФО-ПОСТИ). Calendar dots exclude stories. Monthly tasks auto-generated on startup for 2026-03 and 2026-04 (30 total tasks). Tasks appear in correct columns based on assignee. Events 'КАДЛ' and 'zzzzzzz' exist with dates in late March.
